# AuthorizationString

**Type Alias**

A zero-terminated string in UTF-8 encoding.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AuthorizationString = UnsafePointer<CChar>
```

## Discussion

Use this in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/AuthorizationCopyInfo(_:_:_:)] function for the `tag` parameter.
